svg.title: Agentic RAG system architecture
svg.desc: Two-pipeline architecture: ingestion on top, query/generation on bottom, with fallback branch

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How should I implement the document loaders?')
sendPrompt('How should I implement the TXT loader?')
sendPrompt('How should I handle CSV ingestion?')
sendPrompt('What preprocessing should I apply to documents?')
sendPrompt('What chunking strategy should I use?')
sendPrompt('Which embedding model should I use and why?')
sendPrompt('How should I structure the ChromaDB vector store?')
sendPrompt('How should I preprocess the user query before retrieval?')
sendPrompt('How do I implement the two-stage retriever?')
sendPrompt('How do I implement cross-encoder reranking?')
sendPrompt('How should I implement the fallback response?')
sendPrompt('How should I construct the grounded prompt?')
sendPrompt('Which LLM should I use and how do I call it?')
sendPrompt('How do I format source citations in responses?')

svg.text: tap any node to ask about that component
